code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test11-AUG-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria) further support renal dysfunction, possibly with tubular involvement. HbA1c is low, indicating no chronic hyperglycemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment of renal function and underlying etiology.
